title: PATCH /api/user/preferences — update weight unit preference
description: Implement the endpoint to update the user's preferred weight unit (lbs or kg).
acceptanceCriteria: PATCH /api/user/preferences with weight_unit='kg' returns 200 with updated UserResponse
PATCH with weight_unit='lbs' returns 200 with updated UserResponse
Returns 401 if no valid JWT provided

steps.details: In src/api/schemas/user.py, add UpdatePreferencesRequest(BaseModel) with: weight_unit (Literal['lbs', 'kg']). Using Literal ensures only exactly 'lbs' or 'kg' are accepted.
In user router, add PATCH /preferences route. Handler: set current_user.weight_unit = request.weight_unit, commit, refresh, return UserResponse.

PATCH /api/user/preferences with {"weight_unit": "kg"} — verify 200 and weight_unit is 'kg' in response. PATCH with {"weight_unit": "lbs"} — verify 200. PATCH with {"weight_unit": "pounds"} — verify 422.

technicalNotes: Use Literal['lbs', 'kg'] from typing for strict value validation in Pydantic
